show.description: Base64-encoded `.skyc` show file to generate collective RTH plans for

preferred_distance.description: Preferred distance between drones during collective RTH, in meters

min_distance.description: Minimum distance between drones in collective RTH plans, in meters

velocity_xy.description: Maximum horizontal velocity of drones during collective RTH, in m/s

velocity_z.description: Maximum vertical velocity of drones during collective RTH, in m/s

acceleration.description: Maximum acceleration of drones during collective RTH, in m/s²

time_resolution.description: Time interval between timestamps of the generated collective RTH plans, in seconds

first_time.description: Timestamp of the first collective RTH plan relative to show start, in seconds

last_time.description: Timestamp of the last collective RTH plan relative to show start, in seconds
